pilot_overview.purpose: Validate experimental pipeline on SynthSAEBench-16k subset before committing to full 6-variant x 5-replicate experiment
pilot_overview.go_criteria: MultiScale shows absorption reduction vs. Baseline with Cohen's d > 0.5; metrics validate (random control MCC < 0.1); no training instability

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Baseline ReLU SAE
pilot_tasks.description: Train Standard ReLU SAE on 1,024-feature subset. Validate ground-truth absorption measurement pipeline.

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: +TopK SAE
pilot_tasks.description: Train TopK SAE (k=50) on same subset. Test if explicit k-sparsity affects absorption.

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: +MultiScale SAE
pilot_tasks.description: Train MultiScale SAE on same subset. Critical pilot for H1---must show strong absorption reduction.

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Random decoder control
pilot_tasks.description: Random decoder initialization without training. Validates metrics discriminate structure from randomness.

decision_matrix.GO: All pilots pass criteria. MultiScale shows d > 0.5. Proceed to full 6-variant x 5-replicate experiment.
decision_matrix.GO_WITH_REVISION: MultiScale shows trend (d > 0.3) but not strong effect. Consider increasing training tokens or adjusting hyperparameters before full experiment.
decision_matrix.NO_GO: MultiScale shows no effect (d < 0.3) OR metrics fail validation (random control MCC > 0.3). Flag for strategic pivot to backup candidate (cand_a diagnostic paper or cand_c theory).

falsification_checks.meaning: Metrics do not discriminate structure from randomness. Pipeline is broken.
Absorption rate is at floor or ceiling---no room to measure component effects.
falsification_checks.action: GO_WITH_REVISION - adjust L1 coefficient or feature count

falsification_checks.meaning: MultiScale increases absorption (opposite of prediction). H1 is falsified.

falsification_checks.check: Training instability (NaN loss, all dead features)
falsification_checks.meaning: Hyperparameters or architecture config is wrong.
falsification_checks.action: GO_WITH_REVISION - fix config and re-run pilot
